title: helichrysum cutchicum
intro: Helichrysum cutchicum, also known as False Everlasting, is a flowering plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, known for its distinctive yellow and white blooms. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum cutchicum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular choice for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum cutchicum can be found in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
